---
title: "test_muninn_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_muninn_empire.py"
loc: 97
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.05
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.22
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating teardown_module, TestMuninnEmpire. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 35 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `teardown_module`
- `TestMuninnEmpire`
- `test_init`
- `test_init_no_key`
- `test_run_scan_no_breaches`
- `test_run_with_breach_success`
- `test_forge_improvement_failure`
